story.text:
# 💡 Three-Axis Separation
**concept** · shared · knowledge

Three orthogonal planes: Agent (Swordsman ⊥ Mage), Data (Shielded ⊥ Public), Inference (Generator ⊥ Solver). Multiplicative, not additive. Separation at all three is sovereign.
